algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived toilet door hardware documentation package
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: door hardware and access-control coordination. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Construction drawing door-hardware schedule review variant.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize compact documented partition footprint in door hardware schedule review

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Construction drawing door-hardware schedule review variant.
